name: Brass with Rattan Shade Floor Lamp - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Light up your living room or workspace in modern style with this Brass with Rattan Shade Floor Lamp from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. This floor lamp is designed with a slim metal column atop a round pedestal base and a rattan empire shade, creating a standout look that blends effortlessly with any decor style. Easy to operate with a one-way light setting and pull chain, place this floor lamp next to your armchair or sofa to help create a bright and beautiful space.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy
